title: Cortex Agent Memory Topic
description: YAML frontmatter schema for .agent/memory/{user,feedback,project,reference}/*.md topic files. Validated by /memory-validate (Phase 2 skill).

name.description: Slug used in MEMORY.md index links. Lowercase letters, digits, underscores, dashes only. Aligned with Claude Code Auto Memory slug convention.

description.description: One-line summary shown in MEMORY.md index. Trigger keywords should appear here.

type.description: Memory category. Hard cap per type: user 10 / feedback 30 / project 20 / reference 50.

expires.description: ISO 8601 date. Required for type=feedback (90 days from created). Optional for other types.

tags.description: Keywords used for memory-recall (Phase 2). Lowercase slug convention (digits/underscores/dashes allowed).

metadata.description: Optional Claude Code-compatible metadata block (e.g. type, originSessionId). Reserved for future cross-tool compatibility; cortex-agent's own `type` field at top level remains canonical.

related.description: Cross-references to existing .agent/ components. Avoid duplicating their content.
